**Report output, if relevant:**

Please paste output from `llm-spend report --share` rather than a plain
`llm-spend report` — `--share` strips dollar amounts and masks API
key/project names, so it's safe to paste here. If the bug is specific to
raw numbers not showing up in `--share` mode, say so and we'll figure out
a safe way to look at the real numbers together.

```
(paste --share output here)
```
